findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.43 (foreground color: #89898d, background color: #242429, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
findings.remediation: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast?application=axeAPI

findings.summary: Form elements must have labels
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  Element does not have an explicit <label>
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute
  Element has no placeholder attribute
  Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
findings.remediation: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/label?application=axeAPI

findings.html: <kbd class="font-sans bg-background/50 border border-border/50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] shadow-sm font-bold opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:border-primary/20 transition-all">⌘</kbd>
findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element content contains only non-text characters
findings.remediation: Manually verify this condition before treating it as a confirmed defect.

findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element content is too short to determine if it is actual text content
findings.remediation: Manually verify this condition before treating it as a confirmed defect.

findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element's background color could not be determined because it's partially obscured by another element
findings.remediation: Manually verify this condition before treating it as a confirmed defect.
